title: capsella bursa-pastoris subsp. thracicus
intro: Capsella bursa-pastoris subsp. thracicus, also known as thracian shepherd's purse, is a subspecies of the common weed Capsella bursa-pastoris. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of thracian shepherd's purse include its ability to reduce coughs and colds, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
